A movie compilation of the first and second cours of Aldnoah.Zero and also includes the new animation to conclude the series, Aldnoah.Zero: Ame no Danshou -The Penultimate Truth-.
Sequel to SHIBUYA♡HACHI Part 2.
2 OVAs bundled with the manga's 8.1st volume.
Sequel to Sai-Kyo-Oh! Zukan: The Ultimate Battles.
The third season of Shen Yin Wangzuo.

The second season of Ranma 1/2 (2024).

Brace yourselves for the hilarious romantic comedy's return! What antics and arguments will Ranma and Akane get into next?

(Source: Netflix Anime)

title_romaji: Vigilante: Boku no Hero Academia ILLEGALS
description:
Kouichi Haimawari is a dull college student who aspires to be a hero but has given up on his dream. Although 80% of the world’s population has superhuman powers called Quirks, few are chosen to become heroes and protect people. Everything changes for Kouichi when he and Pop☆Step are saved by the vigilante Knuckleduster and get recruited to become vigilantes themselves!

(Source: Crunchyroll)

title_english: Puniru is a Kawaii Slime Season 2
description:
The second season of Puniru wa Kawaii Slime.

After years of friendship with the slime girl, Puniru goes missing in the middle of training to become cuter. Meanwhile middle schooler Kotarou struggles to deal with her shape-shifting charms — and his feelings. Later, Kotarou receives an unexpected, leaky package..

(Source: Crunchyroll, Netflix, edited)

Scarlet, the protagonist of this work, is a princess whose father, the king of a certain country, was murdered. However, after failing to exact revenge, Scarlet wakes up to find herself in the "Otherlands."

In this "Otherlands," filled with madness, it is said that if one does not exact revenge on their nemesis and reach the "Infinity Land," they will become "nothingness" and disappear from existence.

Will Scarlet be able to exact revenge on her nemesis without becoming "nothingness"? The story unfolds as the endless journey for revenge begins.

(Source: Animate Times, Translated)
WE'RE LIVE! Join the most professional & fan-favorite streamer to explore Terra! Live stream mishaps? Not a chance!

title_romaji: Nageki no Bourei wa Intai Shitai 2
title_english: Let This Grieving Soul Retire Cour 2
description:
The second half of Nageki no Bourei wa Intai shitai.

Krai’s adventures as a reluctant leader return, with more chaos ahead.

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

title_romaji: Shaonian Ge Xing: Xue Ran Tianqi Pian
description: The fourth season of Shaonian Ge Xing.
The fifth season of Bai Yao Pu.

title_english: The Daily Life of the Immortal King Season 5
description:
The fifth season of Xian Wang De Richang Shenghuo.

Wang Ling, a dry noodle-loving immortal king, now faces his greatest challenge yet! With a novelist dad, a mysterious mom, a brand-new little sister, and the sudden arrival of a powerful little sister, Wang Nuan, the Wang family’s ordinary life is turned upside down. And figuring out how to be a good older brother becomes the latest challenge for the mighty immortal king. Surprisingly, Wang Nuan’s extraordinary power doesn’t shock the Wang family. Wang Ling starts early, teaching his sister to control her immense abilities. But her power catches the attention of the sinister organization Ye Kui and Bai Zhe, a top-tier prisoner from Enchanted Prison. Faced with threats from evil cultivators, Wang Ling makes a decision that defies tradition: he’ll take his sister along to teach these villains a lesson! This season, join the immortal king and his little sister as they dive into a life filled with humor and unexpected adventures!

(Source: Bilibili)

The young warrior Yun Qingyan disappeared from the world three years ago, but he was actually drawn into the fairy world for three thousand years! With his extraordinary talent, he became the Yun Emperor, one of the ten great fairy emperors. However, because he was tired of the intrigues in the fairy world and missed his family, he decided to return to the human world at all costs. Upon return to the human world, his parents and sister strangely disappeared, and due to an incident whilst traveling from the fairy world to the human world, he lost his magic weapon and his cultivation became almost zero. Major forces took this opportunity to hunt him down. The fairy emperor became the target of public criticism, and his family was in danger! Yun Qingyan relied on his extraordinary fairy emperor talent to refine pills and array formations, study and practice, and overwhelm his enemies. He embarked on an adventure to revive his family, find his relatives, and rectify the mortal world.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

title_romaji: Fanren Xiu Xian Zhuan Di Si Ji
description: Fourth season of Fanren Xiu Xian Zhuan.

Sequel to Ao no Exorcist: Yuki no Hate-hen.

Yukio parts ways with Rin and makes his way to the Illuminati. In order to face Yukio, who is seeking strength and the truth, Rin decides that he must learn the secret of their birth. With Mephisto’s guidance, he embarks on a journey to the past.

Rin traces the footsteps of their adoptive father, Shirou Fujimoto, and birth mother, Yuri Egin. But the path they took in life was harsher than Rin could have ever imagined….

Why were children born between the Demon God Satan and a human? What was the Blue Night? And when Rin learns everything, what will be his answer?

(Source: Official Site)

title_romaji: Hoshi no Kodomo to Hajimari no Ki

description:
In the near future, as technology takes another leap forward, humanity becomes increasingly immersed in the metaverse. However, with this digital evolution comes a surge in cybercrime. To counter it more effectively, metaverse operators have begun equipping AI with advanced investigative capabilities.

Violet, an artificial intelligence designed for interrogations, is assigned a new task: to question a young woman named Mia.

On the hottest day of summer vacation, the clean freak boy George is taken to the bustling public swimming pool by his parents. There, he sits at the edge of the pool, terrified, until he sees his little sister floating all by herself...

An original animation about the daily life of five girls who have just become university students.

They love delicious food, want to have lots of fun with everyone, and try their best to study, so they're enjoying university life to the fullest!

(Source: Official Site, Translated)

Gen Kinokura, 34 years old.

A solitary camper who cherishes his alone time in nature, Gen enjoys his usual solo camping trips. However, he unexpectedly encounters Shizuku Kusano, a complete beginner in camping. Reluctantly, Gen ends up camping with Shizuku, despite it being the last thing he wanted to do.

What will become of Gen’s peaceful camping life now that it’s turned upside down by this new companion?

(Source: Pony Canyon)

title_romaji: NEET Kunoichi to Naze ka Dousei Hajimemashita OVAs
description: Special episodes streaming on several streaming services, later included on the series Blu-ray.

Kitada Gaku is a prodigy in Mathematics and a scholarship holder at Wels Private Academy, a renowned institution with a long history in the International Mathematical Olympiad. After a series of unfortunate events, he meets Asakura Kai, a culinary prodigy with his own catering business. What does the future hold for these two geniuses, and how do their paths intertwine with each other's?

My Melody opens a cake shop in Mariland. After encountering a heart in the forest, strange things start happening around her. Meanwhile, Kuromi's Japanese sweets shop across the street is always empty. Kuromi searches for the secret to My Melody's cakes. My Melody and Kuromi work hard to prepare for a sweets-making contest judged by the world-famous pastry chef Pistachio. However, no one knows that this will lead to an incident that threatens the fate of Mariland.

(Source: Netflix)

Ryou is delighted to be reincarnated into the fantastical world of Phi, where he thinks he’ll get to live a quiet life learning to use his newfound water magic. Going with the flow here, however, means something very different. Ryou is immediately pitted against the wild lands he winds up in and the slew of deadly monsters that call the remote subcontinent home. You’d think he’d forget about taking it easy when he’s stuck fighting for his life, but lucky for Ryou, he’s naturally optimistic, clever, and blessed with the hidden “Eternal Youth” trait. Twenty years pass in the blink of an eye, and each encounter along the way pushes him one step closer to the pinnacle of human magic. Little does he realize that’s only the opening chapter of his tale. A fateful meeting soon thrusts Ryou to the forefront of history, forever changing the course of his life... Thus begins the adventures of the strongest water magician the world has ever seen—who also likes to do things at his own pace!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

Episode 1

Teddy Steady & Teddy Steady: One More!!
Rina Sanjou, a tanned gal, secretly has feelings for Zen Narazaki, her younger childhood friend who is uncool and boring. Zen is made to cosplay as a bear, and Rina is warmed by the sight of him in it. They've been playing dress up since they were little, and as an extension of that, she's been sucking Zen's dick. They've been doing that for a long time. But Zen says he wants to end their relationship. With a sense of despair, Rina tells him her true feelings. "Because it's with you... I want to play dress up. Because it's with you... I want to have sex." And so, the two finally understand each other's feelings, and become immersed in a world of love and romance.

Episode 2

Oohata-san wa Risou no Gal
On his first day at his new school, Shigeharu Miyata finds his ideal gal, Juria Oohata. Everything about Juria is ideal from head to toe, and he's happy just to be allowed to be with her; she's his one and only favorite. Is it a crush, a confession, does he like her, or does he want to do it!? From now on, look at me, not through the lens of a camera!!

Kanojo no Kawaii Mieppari
Sara Yamaguchi and Takayuki Hara have only recently started dating. When Takayuki tells Sara in a hotel bed that it's his first time, Sara boasts that she'll take the lead. A first for someone with the appearance of a gal?! She can't really tell him that she's still a virgin now. In the midst of all this nervousness, she is so frightened at the sight of Takayuki's hard cock that she slaps him. Her awkwardness lets him know that she's a virgin. It's tough... painful... but I want more... I love you ♡

(Source: Mediabank, translated)
Chibi shorts to Kusuriya no Hitorigoto 2nd Season released on the TOHO animation YouTube channel.
Yu-Gi-Oh! CARD GAME THE CHRONICLES is a monthly short-anime series showcasing Official Card Game-original card themes. It is an expansion of the demo reel of the same name released the previous year.

Every night, Tomoe has a nightmare about writhing with pleasure in the guidance room, getting creampied by a student, and filming herself giving a double peace sign with a dazed look on her face. Just as she is feeling contempt for the student who is giving her lewd looks again today, Nemoto, who appears in her dreams every night, appears! When Nemoto calls Tomoe to the audiovisual room, Tomoe makes it clear that she dislikes Nemoto, but when she sees his penis, she can't contain her excitement and kneels down...!

(Source: Lune-soft, translated)

title_romaji: Kimi to Koete Koi ni Naru
title_english: With You, Our Love Will Make It Through
description:
When high schooler Mari bumps into a fellow tardy student, she's surprised to find out he's a beastfolk who's to attend her school! After all, it's not rare for beastfolk to coexist alongside humans, but it's still uncommon, with the prejudice and all. Nervous to meet one at first, Mari soon learns there's more to him than his furry exterior. In fact, the more she gets to know him, the more she finds herself drawn to him, his steadfastness, his kindheartedness, and…his body…

(Source: Yen Press)

In a futuristic world where humans and mermaids coexist, ChaO follows Stephan, a mild-mannered office worker at a shipbuilding company, whose life is upended when he is suddenly proposed to by Chao — a princess from the mermaid kingdom. With no time to make sense of what’s happening, Stephan soon finds himself living with the unpredictable, wholehearted Chao. As her sincere love begins to break down his emotional barriers, an unexpected and touching romance begins to unfold.

(Source: GKIDS)

I'm supposed to be reading the air so I don't screw up,
I'm doing what everyone else is doing,
Why can't I get things done?

Rise Azumino, a university student, was lost in her life,
One day, guided by an invitation letter left behind by her late grandmother, she enters “Wonderland".
There she meets a girl named Alice and they begin their journey together.

Rise meets the White Rabbit, the Caterpillar, the Queen of Hearts, the Trumpeter, the Mad Hatter and the March Hare, Humpty Dumpty, the twins Tweedle Dum and Tweedle Dee, the Cheshire Cat and ......
The residents of Wonderland appear one after another in front of Rise!
And the crazy commotion that ensues!
What kind of future will Rise choose in this crazy adventure with Alice?

This adventure will surely bring a smile to your face tomorrow!

(Source: Official Site, Translated)

title_english: Alma-chan Wants to Be a Family!
description:
A body that combines the appearance of an adorable young girl with overwhelming combat efficiency. An AI with intelligence and decision-making skills that surpass human capabilities—the perfect autonomous robot, "Alma" was created by the overlooked young genius scientists Enji and Suzume whose brilliance should've been recognized by the world! Alma calls Enji and Suzume "Father" and "Mother" which leaves them completely flustered. Regardless, the three begin a life together as a family in order to nurture Alma's powerful AI and help her evolve into the ultimate robot. Alma's curiosity has no limits as everything she sees and touches is new to her. Alma keeps Enji and Suzume on their toes with her unmatched learning capabilities and unstoppable energy as she explores the bigger world. A brand-new kind of family comedy (?!) begins!!

(Source: Crunchyroll)

The story unfolds through the eyes of cats, offering glimpses of intense battlefields, fleeting moments in history, heartfelt family bonds, and imaginative visions of the future. Rendered in a variety of styles, including ink painting, 2D animation, 3D visuals, and stop motion, it captures the essence of Eastern aesthetics. Ten surreal and enigmatic scrolls about cats are revealed, one by one, drawing the audience into their mysterious world.
A short directed by loundraw. Made as a collaboration between Z-Kai Group, loundraw, and FLAT STUDIO.
Based on the erotic doujin game by Moguhachi (もぐハチ).

Follows the funny and amusing daily lives of two cats who want to live life doing only fun things.

(Source: Anime News Network)

Chick tells Mouse, "I love you." Mouse tells Duck, "I love you." Duck tells Rabbit... What happens when Rabbit can't quite get the words out? Animals share their joy and affection with full-body expression in this picture book perfect for reading aloud and with plenty of opportunities for hugs.

(Source: Kodansha)

Note: Exists in two versions, a 30-second commercial edition and a 2½ minute “Director’s Cut” edition

title_romaji: IDOLiSH7: First BEAT! Gekijou Soushuu-hen - Zenpen
description: The first film in a duology compiling the first season of IDOLiSH7.

Third season of the interactive collaborative multimedia music project between DECO*27 and Takuya Yamanaka.

The list of released videos included in this entry are as follows:
1) Yuno - Life (ユノ - ライフ), June 18, 2025.
2) Futa - The Appare March (フータ - 天晴行進曲), Aug 20, 2025.
3) Muu - Pain (ムウ - ペイン), Oct 22, 2025.
4) Kazui - Camouflage (カモフラージュ), Mar 18, 2026.

Comedy spin-off to the Araiguma Rascal (Raccoon Rascal) anime.

The story is set around five employees working hard in the lesser Tama branch of a secret society aiming for world domination called the Calcal Group: an aspirational new recruit, a polite but self-conscious superior, a modern guy with a cold attitude to everything, a hotheaded but kind senior employee and a handsome older man leading the pack.

(Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title_english: Li'l Miss Vampire Can't Suck Right
description:
Luna Ishikawa is a dark and mysterious vampire—or so she'd like her new classmates to believe. The truth is, while she may be one of the not-so-mythical bloodsuckers, she doesn't really live up to the hype. She's short and clumsy, and she can't even suck blood properly! So when her classmate Tatsuta Ootori discovers her little “drinking problem,” he can't help but lend a hand. Can he nurse Luna from the small, timid animal she is into a fearsome creature of the night?!

(Source: Yen Press)

The film centers on Chapon, a mysterious boy who falls from the sky without any knowledge of where he came from. Staying with Anpanman, he one day helps someone out and gets to know the joy of making someone smile, and dreams of becoming a hero like Anpanman. But when Baikinman arrives, and reveals the secret of Chapon's origins, Chapon must figure out if his origins or his dreams define who he is.

(Source: Anime News Network)

Special animation made to commemorate Pokemon Day 2025.

This short follows the story of Hana, a young girl who lives in Paldea and admires the Dragonite postman. She aspires to become a postman but one day finds a letter with no addressee so decides to try and help find the send with her partner Fuecoco. When they find the sender, a boy named Rio, they learn that Rio sent the letter to celebrate the birthday his father who lives in Kanto, and to make it worse, the birthday is today. It's up to Hana, Rio and Dragonite to get the letter to him as soon as they can.

(Source: Serebii, edited)

title_english: The Shy Hero and the Assassin Princesses
description:
Hero Toto possesses great skills, but his extreme shyness has left him unable to form a party, causing him to remain stuck in the town where his journey began.

One day, he is suddenly invited to join a party by three beautiful women—Ciel, Anemone, and Gore. Overjoyed at finally setting off on an adventure, Toto is filled with excitement... but little does he know, these women are dead set on killing him!

A deathly harem romcom unfolds as the socially anxious hero, who faints from mere flustered excitement around women, finds himself the target of three deadly companions, each with their own reasons for wanting him gone!

Note: Each episode streamed 1 week early on ABEMA. The original TV broadcast started on July 12th 2025.

title_english: A Star Brighter Than the Sun
description:
Sae Iwata, a slightly tougher-than-average girl, falls for the gentle smile of Kouki Kamishiro, a delicate boy, back in elementary school. By the time they enter junior high school, Kuoki has grown into a charming and popular teen who now feels out of reach. When they are assigned to the sports festival committee together, Sae’s long-hidden first love begins to stir once more.

(Source: Amazon Prime Video, edited)
Compilation film of GIRLS BAND CRY featuring new animation footage. The first of the GBC compilation movie duology.
The fourth out of six movie sequels to the Princess Principal TV series.
The second season of Kagaku×Bouken Survival!

The down-and-out fairy Yao Ji who traveled through time and space! The young Liu Ling who needed to see himself found the magic stone. The two reached a cooperation and found the concubines with special skills to teach them. Liu Ling successfully started his journey to the East Palace. As they spent time together day and night, he suddenly found that he had different feelings for Yao Ji...

title_romaji: Hitozuma no Kuchibiru wa Kan Chu-Hi no Aji ga Shite
title_english: Chuhai Lips: Canned Flavor of Married Women
description:
If ever there was an opportunity to enjoy canned chuhai alone with 'that' married woman... Tsuyoshi is a college student living the lazy life. As he reaches for a canned chuhai to perk things up, a charming, married woman with a catch appears before him, and they have a drink together. As the two get closer and closer, skin to skin, no doubt something's bound to happen! An immoral anthology series mixed with married women and strong canned chuhai!

(Source: OceanVeil)

title_romaji: Ansatsusha de Aru Ore no Status ga Yuusha yori mo Akiraka ni Tsuyoi no da ga
title_english: My Status as an Assassin Obviously Exceeds the Hero’s
description:
Akira Oda and his high school classmates are summoned to another world! While the other students are granted cheat abilities through the summoning, Akira merely gains the abilities of a mediocre “assassin.” However, his status soon surpasses “hero,” the strongest profession. After Akira becomes suspicious of the King behind the summoning, he is falsely framed for a crime and forced to flee.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

When I transferred to a certain school... I find out I'm the only guy there! Shinji is alone at the school and can't make any friends, but then his classmate Hana talks to him. Shinji is excited to have made his first new friend, but she confesses to him that she is involved in adult entertainment activities to uphold public morals... For the sake of her activities, Hana decides to engage in naughty activities with Shinji!?

(Source: Lune-soft, translated)

Kakurenbo
On the night of the school trip, Ryou sneaks into the girls' room alone, planning to have his first kiss with his girlfriend, Hina. However, everyone returns to their rooms and the kiss goes awry. The two decide to hide in the closet on the spur of the moment...

Motto Kakurenbo
Since their first time on the school trip, Hina and Ryou have maintained a good relationship as lovers. However, there is one problem: Ryou wants to have sex inside the school. One day during club activities, Hina is suddenly called by Ryou to the gym storage room, where he asks her for a favor...

(Source: PinkPineapple, translated)
The fifth season of Yong Sheng.

Xie Kanhua was about to be executed in the Shanglin Celestial Palace. When Su Baiyi was rescuing him, the Shanglin Celestial Palace disintegrated, and Su Baiyi was taken away by Su Jian, the Demon Lord who had voluntarily confined himself in the secluded prison for twenty years. Then the Hero Conference of Xuanwei Town is held again, Bai Jile lures Divine Official Xue, the second-best martial artist in the world to participate, plunging the martial arts world into chaos. In order to save the injured Nangong Xi'er, Su Baiyi went to the North Kunlun with Su Jian to pay a visit to Su Suomo, the ancestor of the Su family, while Yuling and Feng Zuojun respectively headed to Qingcheng Mountain and the Demon Town to learn martial arts. Under the latent tension, the Yingzhou Immortal Island reappeared. The invaders from the island issued a provocation to the martial artists, saying that those who submit will prosper, while those who resist will perish...

Since ancient times, Dahe Shenzhou has been a land where virtue and evil have been at odds. Numerous justice-related sects have banded together to combat the evil's twelve irresponsible sects. The justice Jinyi Sect's low-level supernatural power is Li Wannian, who possesses ordinary cultivation. He wants to live a life of peace and quiet, lying flat in the Jinyi Sect and receiving a salary.

He unexpectedly learned, however, that he possessed the eternal capacity to instantly resurrect at the point of life-or-death crisis while completing a task to deal with the transfer. More significantly, he can improve his cultivation after each resurrection by receiving incentives in the form of points based on his overall performance at the time of his beheading. To put it another way, Li Wannian has to make a valiant sacrifice, and in a way that inspires and motivates others if he hopes to advance his cultivation.

title_romaji: Tian Guan Ci Fu Short Film
description: A series of short episodes.

title_romaji: Nezha: Zhi Mo Tong Nao Hai
description:
After the heavenly lightning, although Ne Zha and Ao Bing survived by becoming Spirits, they would soon dissipate completely. Taiyi plans to rebuild Ne Zha and Ao Bing's mortal bodies with the Seven-colored Precious Lotus. However, during the process of reconstruction, numerous obstacles arise. What will become of the fate of Ne Zha and Ao Bing?

(Source: AMC)

The ninja banish evil from the shadows. The gokudo gather lonely outcasts and commit crimes. The grudge they forged centuries ago is rekindled in the present day. The ninja Shinoha meets Kiwami, a gokudo with the face of a businessman. Unknowing of the other's identity, they bond over anime, but the war between ninja and gokudo intensifies. Who will survive and who will perish, ninja or gokudo?

(Source: Amazon Prime Video)

Two young girls, Youko and Airi, travel through an empty post-apocalyptic world.

They photograph the scenery of famous places all to themselves and camp out in towns full of nature.

The two of them ride and travel on a Serow off-road motorbike together, experiencing a never-before-felt freedom in travel with no traffic and no traffic lights.

With the Serow bike, they embark on a journey around a now-destroyed Japan; a unique story about touring on a bike comes to life as an anime series!

The world's over now, so let’s hop on a bike and go on a journey!

(Source: Crunchyroll)
Music video directed by Saho Nanjou for the song Kamone by Ai Kizuna.

After taking the girls' band world by storm, "BanG Dream Chan" is back!?

Get ready for a huge reunion with all your favorite pop and cute band members in the fun-filled girls' band comedy!

Come on, BanG Dream Chan! We are all BanG Dream Chan!

(Source: BanG Dream! GBP Twitter account)

Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

title_romaji: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE
description:
On February 28, ONE PIECE took over Crypto.com Arena for a special game night collab event with the Los Angeles Lakers. The Lakers ended up taking down their opponents in a close 106-102 game, and maybe some of that juice is thanks to the presence of the Straw Hats and a special piece of animation created for the event.

The anime short—which depicts a Lakers uniform-clad Luffy in an intense basketball match against a team of Marines—can be seen in all its 30 seconds of glory. Can our captain Luffy take home the win?

(Source: Crunchyroll News, ONE PIECE Official ENG YouTube description, edited)

title_romaji: Princess Connect! Michibiki no Hatsuhana: Fiore Storia
description:
In the 2030s, VR technology spread around the world with the arrival of the VR-based network device ‘mimi’.
One of the most popular of these was the VR online game ‘Legends of Astrum’.

(Source: Cygames, translated)

Note: Originally was showcased during the 7th anniversary live stream of the game Princess Connect! Re:Dive on February 9, 2025. A complete version has been released later with added scenes on February 28, 2025.
A collaboration between Zutomayo and coalowl in commemoration of the publication of the manga's third volume.

Rosalia is a beautiful adventurer who once hunted demons alongside heroes. After retiring from the front lines, she ran an orphanage in a remote area, living a quiet life while taking in orphaned children. But one day, she found an insect in the orphanage... It was a split body of Demar, the King of Lust, a powerful enemy she had defeated during her time as an adventurer. "You can't be... you're still looking for me..." Rosalia stood alone, trying to ward off the demonic clutches of revenge, but countless tentacles attacked her ripe body――!?

(Source: PinkPineapple, translated)

"In a world where words mean power, they risk all that they stand for".

The final Division Rap Battle begins. 48 different patterns, 16 new songs and 7 possible endings.

This film will be Japan's first-ever interactive movie, where the audience's choices will change the development and outcome of each screening. The story unfolds differently based on the audience’s decisions, offering an entirely new participatory cinematic experience.

(Source: Hypnosis Mic Youtube Channel, edited)

Square Enix’s sci-fi arcade game Starwing Paradox is making a comeback as a prequel anime movie. A new anime feature film titled AS ONE has been announced as a prequel story set 20 years before the events of the game, expanding the game’s universe with a new story. The movie is set to premiere in Summer 2025.

(Source: Anime Corner)

Kotesashi Kouyou possesses outstanding skill as a masseur. He aspires to become a sports doctor and wants to get a scholarship in medical school. Starting spring, he attends the high school attached to Seiwa University, a sports powerhouse. Since his family is not wealthy, he has to work as a hostel manager, where he is also allowed to stay, to pay for his school expenses. There he encounters high school girl athletes with various problems. Kotesashi's job is to take care of them physically and mentally and be the hostel manager.

(Source: Kodansha, translated)

title_romaji: Tamaranai no wa Koi nano ka
description:
Misuzu was branded a delinquent when a small incident left him isolated. But one day, he sees the top student, Kitahara, get surrounded by bullies and decides to help him out. That sparked Kitahara's interest in the lonely boy, but Misuzu pushes Kitahara away. "If you get involved with me, you'll get ostracized by everyone else too." But it won't take long for Misuzu's resolve to falter...

(Source: K Manga)

title_romaji: Kimetsu no Yaiba x MLB Tokyo Series presented by Guggenheim
description:
Major League Baseball enters the world of Demon Slayer for the Tokyo Series.

As MLB celebrates games in Japan, baseball has partnered to release a Demon Slayer short film that depicts the evolution of Japanese baseball through the continuous passing of the torch across generations.

(Source: MLB Official Facebook)

The anime is set in an alternate version of Heian-kyou, the old name of Kyoto and the capital during Japan's Heian era. This alternate version of the city is named Denji Heian-kyou. A delinquent high schooler named Takeru Narehira resides in our world, but after an unfortunate accident, is transported to Denji Heian-kyou.

Here, he immediately meets Tsukimiya, a woman he has seen many times before in his dreams. Hardly a moment passes after that encounter when Takeru and Tsukimiya encounter an oni monster, and lose their lives.

Takeru awakens, stunned to find himself again at Denji Heian-kyou. He puts together that he has the power to go back in time. Now he resolves to learn this world's version of mystical onmyōjutsu techniques, and become an onmyōji sorcerer to save Tsukimiya.

(Source: Anime News Network)

Episode 1

Oyako to Mukaeru Asa wa ♥ - chapter 1
Kurabe started working under his female boss, Sakino, and whenever he finished work, he would have a drinking party and have sex with Sakino. Just after she climaxed and went to sleep, Sakino's daughter, Sayana, appeared in his bedroom. Right in front of her mother, Sayana began to crave Kurabe's cock!?

Oyako to Mukaeru Asa wa ♥ - chapter 2
Tokoroda, a teacher, comes to the home of Mai, a student who has just transferred to the school. Mai is cold at school, but at home she is like a completely different person, and actively seduces him!! It turns out that she is Mai's mother (with a very baby-like face)!! With the tiny mother and daughter Mai joining in, it's a steamy mother-daughter bowl!!

Episode 2

Oyako to Mukaeru Asa wa ♥ - chapter 3
A shut-in named Touki lives with his brother Yuuta, his brother's wife Keiko, and her daughter, Hio. Touki is curious about his brother's wife Keiko's sex life. He sets up a hidden camera in the couple's room and takes pictures of them!! However, his actions are discovered by Keiko and his niece Hio!! Hio and Keiko seduce Touki. Will Touki develop a rotten relationship with mother and daughter?

Oyako to Mukaeru Asa wa ♥ - chapter 5
Kozue Komiyui, a classmate of Hio, was taught by Touki, who was her private tutor, when she was young. When Kozue visits Touki's house to see him, she faints from the sight she sees there, which is beyond her imagination. When she wakes up, she finds Touki, Keiko, and Hio naked having sex. Keiko forces her to make a choice, and she makes up her mind and throws herself into the group.

(Source: Mediabank, translated and edited)

title_romaji: Toujima Tanzaburou wa Kamen Rider ni Naritai
title_english: Tojima Wants to Be a Kamen Rider

Tanzaburo Tojima has dreamt of becoming a Kamen Rider his whole life. But now that he’s 40 years old, he’s starting to think his dream may never come true…until he’s swept up in a series of crimes inspired by the infamous “Shocker”! From Air Master and 81 Diver’s Shibata Yokusaru comes a wild, heartfelt tale about adults who love Kamen Rider a little too much and start playing pretend—for real!

(Source: Crunchyroll)

Animated graduation work by Manami Honda from Nihon Kougakuin College (Hachioji Campus).

Kamishiro Takeru was just an ordinary guy with an ordinary office job, until he’s suddenly summoned to Madeus, a world with swords and magic. Life as he knew it is over, but he’s starting his new one with powerful abilities: enhanced strength, overwhelming magic, and a “search” skill that allows him to find valuable items! Armed with his new cheat skills, Takeru begins his isekai journey!

(Source: Crunchyroll)

Note: Each episode streams 1 week early on some streaming services. The original TV broadcast starts on October 7th, 2025.

description:
Hiroshi Nohara, Japan's ultimate family man, is obsessed with lunch in order to work hard in the afternoon! The official spin-off gourmet manga of the popular "Crayon Shin-chan"!

(Source: Comic Action, translated)

Based on the hit manga of the same name, the Record of Ragnarok saga continues with 13 one-on-one battles for the survival of humanity, pitting gods against humans from across the world. Witness the fateful seventh battle: the final fight to break the 3-3 tie between the gods and humans.

(Source: Netflix)

title_romaji: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun
description:
Kashiwada-san’s face is a masterpiece of stoicism. Her classmate Oota-kun? A walking explosion of emotions determined to crack her calm with over-the-top antics. (Spoiler: It’s not working.) But between his failed surprises and her secret smiles, these polar-opposite classmates might just be into each other! Witness a rom-com where love speaks louder than expressions.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

Tomakomai (43 years old) is an old office worker who has become a magical girl as a result of power harassment by the company president. She (he) settles in a magical girl village where the happy Nemuro (120 years old? I don't remember anymore) and Seikou (270 years old? I don't remember anymore) live, who can't live without alcohol. The magical girl life in this (illegally occupied) village filled with madness and despair begins!

(Source: Official Synopsis, Translated)

title_romaji: Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu!
description:
Four part adaptation of the Girls und Panzer: Motto Love Love Sakusen desu! manga.

(Source: Natalie Comics)

The Creator of Aotu World is a reckless God who created a universe full of inequality, but also gave the people a chance to change their destiny- Just participate in the "Aotu Tournament" and utilize the "Special Abilities" granted by the system. Pass rounds of cruel tests and strive for the ultimate victory! Now, the tournament, which has been suspended for 100 years, has been reopened.

Our protagonist, King, decides to enter the tournament in order to change the fate of his planet, Dengru, and find his sister...

When the bubble gems scatter, exhausting their magical powers, peace returns to the sea, and Purple wants to go back to school on land, but the Purple King is stubbornly opposed. After some serious convincing, Purple announces her intention to run for queen, and is finally allowed to return to the surface. But what lies ahead for her?

One day at the beginning of a new semester, Purple loses her magic wand and her only princess dictionary while trying to protect her friend Leo from the villainous Blobs, Black Diamond's subordinates. Then, White Gold, the guardian of the sea, senses the dark energy and gives her a new catcher and princess dictionary as gifts. With this, Purple creates new bubble gems for the other princesses and upgrades their magic, but she is unable to create a bubble gem with her own color.

The seven mermaid princesses, along with their new human friends including Leo's senior student Gray, the seven mermaids battle the returning and more powerful Black Dia. Without her own bubble gem, can Purple protect the sea world, the humans, and the land world?

The 2025 animated music video from McDonald's: a special mashup called Tirori Mix featuring the songs "Yoru no Pierrot" by Ado, "Yoru ni Kakeru" by YOASOBI, and "BIBBIDIBA" by Suisei Hoshimachi, along with the sounds of a McDonald's fryer chime as the backing beat.

title_romaji: Chikuwa Senki: Ore no Kawaii de Chikyuu Shinryaku

title_english: Cute High Earth Defense Club Hi-CARA!
description:
New series for Binan Koukou Chikyuu Bouei-bu.

Note: Relations is provisional and will be updated when more info is announced.

The story takes place on the planet Elementros, which has unknown powers. The main character, Optimus Prime, follows his friend Megatron and lands on this planet. There, Optimus meets Lightlong, a giraffe-type Transformer who is an energy beast. According to Lightlong, the energy beasts that live on Elementros in the form of animals and dinosaurs have five elements of "element energy" hidden within them: fire, water, earth, nature, and lightning. Suddenly, Megatron attacks. Optimus and Lightlong use the power of their bond to awaken the ability to transform and combine [Wild King]. Optimus joins forces with the animals, and Megatron commands the dinosaurs. What will be its fate?!

(Source: Youtube)

title_romaji: Wo De Shixiong Tai Qiang Le
description: Cultivator Lv Shaoqing’s accidental acquisition of the immortal treasure “Spring and Autumn Ring” led the righteous immortal alliance to label him as a world-destroying demon and hunt him to death. But by some strange twist of fate, he was sent back a thousand years in time and found himself sharing a body with the very enemy who had killed him. Trapped within the enemy's lair, Lv Shaoqing fought wits and courage to reclaim control of the body for survival as well as anticipating the enemy’s actions to collect rare treasures. Eventually, through his remarkable intelligence and courage, Lv Shaoqing became the most despised playboy of the righteous path. At the same time, the hidden secrets of the cultivation world began to come to light. Lv Shaoqing counted with his fingers, and suddenly realized that the course of history had already been changed!

GLITCH THE FUTURE.

Tomoro Tenma lives in a world where human thoughts and emotions—known as “e-Pulse”—power AI devices called Sapotama. But when Digimon begin materializing from Sapotama and feeding on e-Pulse, society begins to fracture. After Gekkomon appears from his device, Tomoro joins Glowing Dawn, a secret team investigating rogue Digimon and the dark truth of a system both fueled and corrupted by emotion. What new future will be forged by humans and Digimon?

(Source: Crunchyroll, DIGIMON BEATBREAK Official Site, edited)

The Precure's small friends have all turned into PetitCure!
It has turned into a huge gathering in the “Mysterious Amusement Park” where anything may come true, and they're all having fun in their own way.

They eat sweets, play on the rides, and have a whole ton of fun!
But something mysterious is happening?

Their Precure companions are all in good-night mode... so they can have all the fun they want!
You will surely feel "cured" by the sight of these PetitCure forms!
Look forward to fun stories every week ♡

(Source: Official Website, translated, edited)

title_romaji: Mikata ga Yowa Sugite Hojo Mahou ni Toushite Ita Kyuutei Mahoushi, Tsuihou Sarete Saikyou wo Mezasu
title_english: The Banished Court Magician Aims to Become the Strongest
description:
"This party does not need a useless magician who can only use support magic. You are fired, Alec Huguette."

One day, Alec, a court magician who had been chaperoning the Crown Prince's dungeon-crawling party, was suddenly fired and banished from the court by the prince. The only one who reached out to him is Yoruha, his former party member from their Academy of Magic days, that had split up four years ago.

"Hey Alec— would you like to come explore dungeons with us again?"

Thus the legendary "Lasting Period" party was revived, and the name will soon became known all over the world once again.

(Source: Lanove Bunko, translated)

title_romaji: Sumikko Gurashi: Sora no Ookoku to Futari no Ko
description: Fourth Sumikko Gurashi movie.

What if cats appeared in that story…? When beloved old tales and fairy stories are joined by cats, a surreal and heartwarming new adventure begins…!? Tabby cats, orange cats, calico cats, and white cats— a delightful mix of feline friends woven into timeless stories is sure to soothe the hearts of all humanity! A charming cat comedy is about to unfold!

(Source: AniOne Asia)
Third season of Punirunes.

title_romaji: Go! Go! Vehicle Zoo: Norimono Star-hen
description: Second season of Go! Go! Vehicle Zoo.

The premise of this spinoff is about three high school students: a young male student, his girlfriend and a third wheel who is a One Piece fanatic. Their names are similar to the Straw Hat Pirates and the group form a fan club dedicated to One Piece.

(Source: One Piece Wiki)
Music video directed by Mimicry Meta for the song Caramel Pain by Suisei Hoshimachi.

A new short anime series based on the characters "Nandemo Ikimono" created by illustrator and character designer Yuri Yokomizo. The stories follow the lives of any and all things, from animals and plants to food and objects.

The shorts will stream monthly on various social media services such as Twitter, Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok, as well as on ABEMA.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title_romaji: Sumikko Gurashi: Koko ga Ochitsukun Desu

description:
Summer! Closed Room!! Intimacy!!! Secret Time Begins

Yoshi is walking along a mountain path with a bug net and cage in hand when he notices an unfamiliar girl in a phone booth. The girl notices Yoshi looking in the direction and calls out to him. The girl's name is Sachi, and she seems to be having trouble getting through on the phone. Yoshi can't leave her alone and enters the booth. But then the bug net gets stuck in the door, preventing him from getting out. To escape the heat, Yoshi takes off his clothes. Sachi hesitates, but she can't stand the heat and takes off her clothes. Yoshi, seeing Sachi's figure, becomes sexually aware. An insect flies out of the insect cage Yoshi is holding. Sachi panics and embraces Yoshi. Yoshi is struck by the softness of Sachi's body.

(Source: Getchu, translated)

title_romaji: Princess Burst!: Kiken-bi no Tanetsuke Haramase Shuuchi Battle!
description:
Based on the erotic doujin game by Dekisui-sen Lilyon (溺水船リリオン).

Yuki Sakurano is on a winning streak as an illegal fighter in underground arenas. One day, the legendary fighter named King comes into her life to scout her as a fighter. Little did Yuki know that this event would drastically change her life in very different ways than she was expecting.

(Source: Steam)
Music video directed by Shun Yamaguchi for the song Kirameku Bansoukou! by Sana Natori.

Super human Chiharu and cyborg Makina got arrested for breaking space traffic laws. They're stuck with a crew of misfits who got caught around the same time: Akane and Kanata, the super human pair; and Kurt and Max, the cyborg pals. Ryoko, the police officer, sentenced them to clean up the interplanetary train – the so-called "Milky☆Subway," as their community service. It should've been a simple job – until the train suddenly takes off into deep space! The crew scrambles in confusion as chaos unfolds onboard! No purpose! No principle! No point! A never-before-seen space-train spectacle, powered by nothing but pure momentum!

(Source: Official website)

The third season of YouTuNya.

Mell-chan aims to become a professional "care doll" and overcomes various training. What exactly is that training...

Myakumyaku is a mysterious creature born 3.5 billion years ago who wants to talk to someone about life and the future. And that's when he meets a lazy old man! Does the old man and Myakumyaku seem to get along? Or maybe not? A heartwarming comedy with conversations that will make you chuckle.

(Source: NHK, translated)

Though Chichi the cat looks very cute, she has one goal: eradicate humanity and take over the world! She decides to recruit comrades to aid her in her quest, but it looks like world conquest won't be that easy?! Follow the adventures of Chichi the tyrant, Dunno the doggo who loves humans, and Kaiser Kang Taeshik, the hard-boiled wild hamster, as they face many hardships on their path to absolute dominion!

(Source: Kakao Entertainment Corp., translated)

title_romaji: Aikatsu! x PriPara THE MOVIE -Deai no Kiseki-
description:
Akari Oozora and Laala Manaka. Two idols shining in their own worlds suddenly find themselves on the same stage!
A magical encounter between two worlds that was never supposed to intersect: Aikatsu and PriPara!
The idols of Starlight Academy and Parajuku were enjoying a dream collaboration at the joint live festival, but before they knew it the outside world was in big trouble..!?
The perfect stage packed with excitement and glitter! Everyone's friends, everyone's idols — their idol activities begin right here!

(Source: Official Website, translated)

title_romaji: Holoearth Anime PV: "Saa, Anata no Mou Hitotsu no Sekai e"
title_english: Holoearth Anime PV: "Now, Discover Your Other World"
description: Animated promotional video for the video game Holoearth.

title_romaji: Kyou wa Yubiwa wo Hazusu kara......
description: "Yeah, you're doing well. You've grown up." Shinsuke is praised by his admired senior Miyuki. He was carefully trained from the time he was a new employee, encouraged by her consideration, admired and had feelings for her. Recently, she has been working remotely from home, and meetings are held over the internet. He was happy to get a glimpse of her home, but what he saw on the screen when he forgot to turn it off... Shinsuke, seeing her in a shameless state that would be bad if anyone knew about it, takes his married senior to the hotel, overwriting her as if he's tearing her apart. Miyuki, overflowing without resistance as if she's given up, is absorbed in their fleeting intercourse as if she's lost herself. What happens to them is...

A young boy, Mario, is asked by his father, who works for a video game company, to become the GM. Although he is not keen, as a result of his analysis, he realizes that he can experience the same stimulation he received in the game in real life, and as an experiment, he sets his sights on a quiet girl named Koharu Takashina. Koharu wishes to become “a useful and gorgeous character,” which is the opposite of reality. However, the class she is given is that of a prostitute! After being raped by a rough man, her womb starts tingling, even though she is still a virgin in real life...

(Source: PinkPineapple, translated)

Music video directed and animated by Saitei Yasai Corner for the song Kekka Alright by Kocchi no Kento.

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as the opening theme of the anime My Hero Academia: Vigilantes.

Kyouko brags about being scouted by her childhood friend Souji's favorite gravure idol. Souji gets angry and rejects her, but one day, he receives a video. It shows Kyouko in a risque swimsuit, taking on her first gravure shoot! In the video, she is at the mercy of the staff, and eventually she moans while saying Souji's name, being defiled by the hands of a stranger. What will Souji think of this...!?

(Source: Lune-soft, translated)

Since the shocking gravure photo shoot, Kyouko has become strangely seductive, and Souji has also changed... The two have become lovers, and one day Souji invites his friend Segawa to Kyouko's house for study purposes, but Souji sneaks out saying he has something to do. When they are alone, Kyouko actively invites Segawa out! Souji spies on Kyouko and Segawa getting wild with a hidden camera in the room...?

(Source: Lune-soft, translated)

The Umamusume mini-anime is back with a new Golden Week series—Umayuru: Pretty Gray!

(Source: PakaTube!)

title_romaji: A Horny Money World: Densetsu no Yoru
title_english: A Horny Money World: legendary night
description: Music video directed by HASU for the song A Horny Money World: Densetsu no Yoru by Houshou Marine.
Music video directed by Satoru Araki for the song White Balance by KizunaAi.

title_romaji: LUPIN THE IIIRD: Zenigata to Futari no Lupin
title_english: LUPIN THE IIIRD: Zenigata and the Two Lupins
description:
Prequel to Lupin the IIIrd the Movie: Fujimi no Ketsuzoku.

An airport bombing terror attack occurs in the frigid Roviet Union.
The unexpected suspect is Lupin III.
However, the "other Lupin" cornered by Zenigata claims his innocence.
Zenigata, a man of justice, finds himself confronted by the mysterious "fake Lupin."
A national conspiracy, the truth behind the bombing, and the intersection of two Lupins -- Zenigata's beliefs are put to the test.

The most rugged, passionate and melancholy buddy action movie in the series' history begins!

(Source: Official Website, translated)

title_romaji: IDOLiSH7: First BEAT! Gekijou Soushuu-hen - Kouhen
description: The second film in a duology compiling the first season of IDOLiSH7.

title_romaji: Kun Tun Tianxia Zhi Zhang Men Guilai
description:
Fan Lingxiao, a gifted spirit pet master, was ambushed in the A-level sect promotion competition and devoured by his own spirit, Kun. When he woke up, he found himself reincarnated into a young man named "Liu Fengmang" and imprisoned in the White Mansion. His sect, Lingxiao Pavilion, was also in dire straits. In order to find out the truth about the backlash of the spirit Kun and revive the sect, Fan Lingxiao takes his existing spirit pets and embarks on a new adventure with Gu Ling, Cheng Xi, and Yue Tong.

(Source: Bilibili)

Note: The first episode has a runtime of 36 minutes.

The mysterious young man Dafeng rescued Li Huamei, who was seriously ill after being plotted against. Dafeng wanted to go to Kyoto to find his senior sister and happened to be on the same road with Li Huamei. On the way, Li Huamei was shocked to find that her senior sister was the Queen Qin Zhao, and the Queen repeatedly sent assassins to kill her. In order to find out the reason, Dafeng and Li Huamei entrusted their lives to each other and fought against the enemy together. Disputes arose in the rivers and lakes, and the court struggles became more intense. The two were unknowingly involved in a treacherous conspiracy, and Dafeng was the key to solving all the mysteries...

Fifty years ago, the martial arts world was suddenly invaded by the “Hun Dun”. Murong Qiong established the Demon Sect to resist it, but they couldn’t manage to win despite arduous battles. The Divine Messenger Yi Zhihua descended and taught everyone the cultivation method of demonization, and they finally managed to defeat the Hun Dun. However, after the Divine Messenger left, the cultivation method went out of control as it spread in the martial arts world. Disappointed, Murong Qiong retired and his subordinate Yu Huabing seized the power, improved the cultivation method, and created an era of Punk True Qi, making the martial arts world thrive. But the price of prosperity was that all the cultivators became “Shang Gong fanatics”. Dongfang Sheng, harboring an idealistic and sincere aspiration, found Murong Qiong secluded in the Westward Restaurant. He hoped that Murong Qiong would assist in restoring the glory of the martial arts world.The comical story thus began...

(Source: BilibiliTV)
The second part of Mu Shen Ji.

The fourth season of Cardfight!! Vanguard: Divinez.

The 3rd Deluxe has finally reached its climax! The heated qualifiers have ended, and now the curtain rises on the Final!

Who will grasp the title of the strongest in Vanguard!?

(Source: cf-vanguard.com)

In 2050 Seoul, astronaut Nan-young’s ultimate goal is to visit Mars. But she fails the final test to onboard the fourth Mars Expedition Project. The musician Jay buries his dreams in a vintage audio equipment shop. The two fall in love after a chance encounter. As they root for each other and dream of a new future. Nan-young is given another chance to fly to Mars, which is all she ever wanted…

(Source: Netflix)

"I'd like to borrow Botan for a while." Botan is a female ninja about to get married. She is asked by her uncle, who is also a benefactor, to help support the declining samurai estate and her beloved lord. As invited and ordered by her uncle, she hides from the master she should be serving and lets her small body be violated. Despite her reason, which she sees as a duty, her body inevitably responds to the pleasure...

(Source: Mediabank, translated)

Zero crash-lands on the war-torn planet Amatera with no memories and no idea who she is. Amidst a brutal conflict between the local resistance and the imperial Gevuran forces, she meets Ring, a charismatic young leader fighting to save the world. As Zero’s identity slowly awakens, she discovers she’s no ordinary girl—she’s a cosmic being known as Galverse, a key to something far greater than any one planet.

Notes:
• The project was initially funded through a digital art initiative connected to the Galverse NFT collection.
• The entry is currently restricted from being added to favorites due to score and vote brigading by several fake sockpuppet accounts associated with the project.
Music video directed by Riri Yamashita for the song Distortion to Houyou by Fuwa Minato.

Web advertisements for Maruchan's Akai Kitsune & Midori no Tanuki brand instant noodles.

I feel relieved when the “dashi” tastes good.
It is snowing in midwinter, after school at a certain school.

title_english: JUJUTSU KAISEN: Hidden Inventory / Premature Death – The Movie
description:
"The strongest duo—A youth they can never return to."

Recompilation film of Jujutsu Kaisen 2nd Season's "Kaigyoku・Gyokusetsu" (Hidden Inventory / Premature Death) arc (episodes 1-5 re-edited) with new footage showing glimpses of school memories accompanied by an acoustic version of "Ao no Sumika" (Where Our Blue Is) by Tatsuya Kitani.

Before they were enemies, Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto were high school classmates and friends. The two most powerful sorcerers are tasked with protecting Riko Amanai, a student who has been designated to be sacrificed as the Star Plasma Vessel, until she can fulfill her duty. Pursued by a religious cult and other curse users, they are the only sorcerers capable of carrying out such a difficult task – but this mission will set their destinies, and challenge the two sorcerers in ways unimaginable.

(Source: GKIDS)
An anime short that screens alongside the Jujutsu Kaisen: Kaigyoku・Gyokusetsu compilation film, before it begins. Gojo, Geto, and Shoko have a little chat before their film starts in the theater.

Once upon a time, there was a girl named “Sora”. She loved to sing, but one day, something happened that made her scared to sing in front of others. As days passed, she forgot how to sing, and even how to laugh. Then, one day, she and her little brother “Daichi” stumbled upon a mysterious pond.

At a pond called “Kagamiike”: Mirror Pond, Sora discovered a mystical butterfly glowing with aurora colors. As she watched it flutter freely, she suddenly felt a connection. The butterfly’s magical glow seemed to resonate with something deep inside her. Unable to resist, Sora reached out toward the butterfly. But she lost her balance and tumbled headfirst into the pond. Daichi, trying to help her, ended up falling in too...

Beyond the surface of the Mirror Pond, a world of wonder and mystery awaited. As Sora and Daichi stared in amazement, a quirky girl named “Rococo” appeared before them. Before long, the three of them set off on an adventure through “The Land of NOMO”. Along the way, Sora begins to face the many feelings she had kept hidden deep within her heart.

(Part of Panasonic Group Pavilion project for Expo 2025).

Music video directed by Makoto Katou for the song Kireigoto by Hoshimachi Suisei.

This film is based on an ancient legend of the Qiang, an ethnic minority living in the mountainous regions of southwest China. It tells the story of a monkey who grows up among humans and follows the footsteps of his mother, Awubaji, to the Holy Mountain to uncover the secret of warmth. After undergoing many hardships and dangers, the monkey manages to get hold of a fire stone. His fur burns off and he finally turns into a human being. The film is rendered in the style of traditional Chinese ink painting and poetically envisions life in a prehistoric society. The story of the fire thief addresses timeless themes, such as growth and companionship, which are still important today. With Ran Bi Wa, the legendary Shanghai Animation Film Studio, birthplace of many iconic Chinese animations, is celebrating a triumphant return.

A group of female students are on their way to a high-altitude training camp for the astronomy club when their car gets a flat tire and they're stranded. A local person rescues them and invites them into the village. However, it turns out that the village has a tradition of capturing women from outside and forcing them into village marriages. A beautiful teacher risks her life to protect the students held captive in a storehouse, but when she's taken to a large hall, she finds the men stark naked and erect. With their clothes torn off and tortured relentlessly on the spot, her body reaches its limits. The teacher, losing her mind, offers up her students as scapegoats. Meanwhile, the three students left behind in the storehouse have their clothes stripped and their hands and feet bound. One by one, their bodies are trained by the villagers, until they are physically and mentally broken and reduced to human slaves.

(Source: Mediabank, translated)

title_romaji: Azur Lane: 8 Shuunen Kinen Anime PV
description: Animated trailer celebrating Azur Lane's 8th Anniversary.

title_english: Whereabouts of Tomorrow: Ashita no Arika
description:
“Ever since that day...I lost hope for the future.”

In 2021, Asumi, a salesperson at Kobe Steel, was having a difficult time finding meaning in her job while she felt helpless in the face of the company’s numerous issues.

Just as Asumi was about to tell her boss that she wanted to quit, a mystical ray of light came out of a corporate history book and led her to Kobe in 1905. There she encountered visionary, high-spirited people from Kobe Steel's founding period. Torasuke was among them; he was a clumsy but enthusiastic young man from the Meiji era who dreamed big and believed in the potential of industrial development.

Guided by the Kobelco Group's history, two persons from different eras set out on a journey across time, from its beginning to the present.

They witness people get through tough times and continue to take on challenges with hope for a better future.

After coming into contact with the founders’ spirits, they each choose their own path for the future.

(Source: Official KOBELCO Site)
Music video for the song Onomatopoeia ISLAND by Tatsurou Yamashita. The song was featured as the ending for Pokemon Concierge Part 2.
A short story about Ninja Neko fighting crime.
Second season of JOCHUM.

Once upon a time, when television broadcasting itself was an adventure.

The invention of the television has made it possible to broadcast any event, however it is still an era where swords and sorcery abound. It has come for the cameras to turn their lens towards the darkness of dungeons, previously only known to adventurers.

Fighting countless monsters and constant equipment problems, the camera-wielding adventurers continued on, hoping to broadcast the first live dungeon capture. What may await them ahead?

(Source: Official Youtube channel)

title_english: I Saved Myself with a Potion!: Life in Another World
description: Kaede, an ordinary high school girl, suddenly wakes up in an unfamiliar alleyway—only to realize she's been transported to a mysterious world inhabited by beastmen, elves, and dragons. Among her belongings, she discovers a strange book that wasn't there before. To her surprise, it allows her to create potions simply by chanting the word "create." Relying on these potions to survive, Kaede navigates the challenges of this fantastical world while clinging to the hope of one day returning to Japan. Her journey of struggle and discovery in this otherworldly realm is just beginning...

title_romaji: Wangzhe Rongyao: Rongyao Zhi Zhang - Mingyun Pian
description:
Across the vast and boundless Land of Kings, brilliant heroes rise, breaking through obstacles in pursuit of their dreams. We honor these heroes and begin a new chapter of love and courage.

(Source WeTV)

Some people developed extraordinary talents after waves of spiritual energy were released by enigmatic "Spiritual Ruins Gates" that arose all over the planet twenty years ago. Spirit Warriors, who possessed supernatural abilities, were the name given to these talented individuals.

Particularly after demonstrating their unparalleled strength during the devastating Beast Tide Disaster, the uncommon "Space series" fighters were the most elite among them.

From his early years, Jiang Nan, an orphan who grew up in Jiangcheng, Lingzhou, had aspirations of becoming the greatest Spirit Warrior. He awakens as Lingzhou's second-ever space-type warrior at the age of sixteen, with the rarest and most potent ability of all.

Here's where his incredible journey starts...

Yun Wangshu's wedding was meant to be the happiest day of her life, but a brutal conspiracy turned it into a nightmare, slaughtering her entire clan. After a narrow escape, she made a desperate deal with the Silent Court. Now, sixty years later, reborn as the merciless Xihe, she's ready to make her enemies bleed for everything they took from her.

(Source: Youku International Website)

title_romaji: Douluo Dalu Movie: Jiandao Chen Xin
description:
Twenty years before the final Douluo battle, the Spirit Hall had conspired to unify the entire spirit master world and annex all the sects. The Seven Treasures Glazed Tile Sect was the first to be hit and fell into danger. Bone Douluo brought the sect's young master, the five-year-old Ning Rongrong, to ask Sword Douluo to rescue them. So Sword Douluo Chenxin took little Rongrong on a life-and-death escape. However, what they didn't know was that behind this road was a huge conspiracy that would affect Douluo Continent...

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

Zhao Fang brought the game system to another world and found himself a useless young master with no martial arts skills, and only a maid by his side. Faced with difficulties, Zhao Fang felt that it was time to show himself. Zhao Fang, who has extensive game experience, successfully found the system BUG, ​​worked hard to level up, went through hardships, entered countless secret realms, and completed various tasks arranged by the system.

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

After sleeping for ten thousand years, Chen Nan wakes up from the Cemetery of Gods and Demons, and becomes famous after a series of adventures. As Chen Nan arrives in Yangjin Country and meets Chen Xi, a new adventure begins again. He fights in Kaiyuan City, searches for the mystery of his life in the Death Zone, and fights the Ling family just to seek justice. In this season, Chen Nan will continue to search for Yu Xin's traces while exploring the mystery of his life.

(Source: Youku, Google translated)

Seeking his parents, the mountain youth Jiang Han embarks on a journey of cultivation. He accidentally activates the Celestial Beast Cauldron, a legacy left by his mother, and awakens supreme magical powers! From then on, he defies fate and changes his destiny! He battles heaven and earth! On the battlefield where the gods fell, he fights bloody battles against countless races, carving a path to the heavens with his mortal body! He vows to fight for a bright future for humanity!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

Anime shorts that screens alongside the Chainsaw Man compilation films, which adapts the omake extra end chapters of the manga.

Includes:
- What a waste
- Denji and My Staple Recipe
- A mature flavor
- Topknot
- Getting to Know Power!
Music video directed by Hiromu Oshiro for the song HOUR TIME Yellow by ReGLOSS.

A collection of original short episodes based on stories created by light novel authors and illustrators.

Includes:
 • Shoushin Time Leap
 On her final Christmas in high school, Miri confesses to her classmate Takashi, but he rejects her. In her despair, she clings to a past diary. The diary envelops her in light, and Miri finds herself transported six months in the past. She uses this chance, and repeated time leaps, to try to change her future, and find out the reason why Takashi rejected her confession.

• Femme Fatale Ikusei Keikaku
 Hiroki is a high school student who is well liked and chubby. After his cute cousin Tsukino is dumped by her ex-boyfriend, Hiroki decides, "I'll become a beautiful woman and make him fall in love with me, and then dump him!" He recruits friends and allies to help him go on a diet and transform into a femme fatale and avenge his cousin.

• Jack the Reaper
 A man wakes up one day in an interrogation room, with no memory of who he is and why he's there. Before him appears a young female detective. She eventually gets angry with the interrogation and storms out, but an intruder comes in and stabs the man to death. The next moment, he's "back" in the interrogation room.

• Marie Antoinette ni Tensei Shita node, Zenryoku de Guillotine wo Kaihi Shimasu
A female otaku from the present day is reincarnated as Marie Antoinette. She refuses to let her future execution play out, so she uses her knowhow as an otaku and her passion to win over the masses — by turning Louis XVI and his brothers into an idol group.

title_romaji: Sylvanian Families: Freya no Wonder Days
Chou Futsuu Mahou Shoujo Asumi Toruverse
description: Fifth season of the Chou Futsuu series.
Special shorts where the hosts answer various questions. Streamed exclusively on YouTube.

2 years ago, the elves who lived in the hidden forest lost their homes due to a forest fire, now they are living in the Kanagawa Prefecture.

This story however focuses on a human who becomes the roommate of an elf living in an apartment.

(Source: MU)

Tomanto and friends as they solve mysteries using vegetable and fruit trivia.

(Source: Anime News Network)

Takes place in the year 2200, where Japan has become a land of cats as the human population's birth rate has declined. In this future world, cats can talk, learn, and work. The story follows a high school girl and her argumentative cat.

(Source: Anime News Network)
Episode 131 to Episode 182
Compilation film of GIRLS BAND CRY featuring new animation footage. The second of the GBC compilation movie duology.

description: Based on the CG Colection by Tori no Oishii Tokoro.

title_romaji: Fei Ren Zai: Xian Shi Wan Jia
description: Jiuyue, an ordinary working fox, and his fellow gods Ao Lie , Nezha , Xiaotian , and Xiaoyu , accidentally stumble into a game world full of traps. Jiuyue, who loves playing games, actively participates in the adventure, hoping to prove himself by leading his friends who are not good at games to pass the levels. However, this plan suddenly changes due to the appearance of two top game bosses. At the same time, the seemingly happy game world is quietly brewing a dramatic change that threatens all players. The little weakling seriously ignites his fighting spirit and tries to weave his destiny with courage! If nothing unexpected happens, something unexpected should happen...

title_romaji: Lang Lang Shan Xiao Yao Guai
description:
The little pig demon decided to leave Langlang Mountain and form a grassroots team with the toad demon, the weasel demon, and the gorilla demon, to start the journey to the west.

(Source: IMDb)
The third season of Zhen Dao Ge.
The sixth season of Wanmei Shijie. (Episode 235-286)

A divine master accidentally fell into the mortal realm, losing all his magical powers. He'd spent millennia trying to unlock the secrets of ascension, only to discover that the first step was to return to earth, starting all over again! The divine master had intended to emulate other cultivators and plunge into arduous cultivation, but who could have imagined that a chef, appearing out of nowhere, would unexpectedly unlock a new path for him to "level up through food." Having lived on spiritual energy and dew since childhood, when had the noble divine master of the Ninth Heaven ever encountered such down-to-earth human delicacies? He loved to eat, to eat more, and to fight over the food! It wasn't until he'd collected every delicacy in the world, with those kneeling before him in submission, that the divine master realized: I'd eaten myself into invincibility!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

title_romaji: Shinya Ramen no Yuuwaku: SUNTORY Karada wo Omou All-Free CM
description: Web CM for Suntory ALL-FREE non-alcoholic beverage, starring japanese Youtuber SUSURU and with Kouichi Yamadera voicing all the sound effects.

Qian Xiao, a cheerful girl from a fishing village, dreams of becoming an actress in the big city. On her way towards the metropolis, a sudden crash changes everything. Fortunately, she survives—and as a bonus, she obtains the Time Dial, a mysterious pendant which gives her the ability to control time. As she excitedly experiments with her newfound power, Qian Xiao becomes the target of a criminal cabal. Seventeen, an assassin from that group, enters her life. What adventure will unfold when a cold-faced, obsessive-compulsive killer and a carefree village girl cross paths?

(Source: Fantasia Festival)

Born in Asuka Village, Sakichi was discriminated against by the villagers because of his appearance. One day, Sakichi discovered Reiko being held captive in a large mansion. Sakichi infiltrates the mansion to rescue her, only to find it to be a trick mansion filled with various traps and mazes.

(Source: Kanazawa Film Fest 2025 Website, translated)

Note: Production began in 1992 following the completion of MIDORI, with Harada working on the film single-handedly and funding it himself.

title_romaji: Huanggu En Chou Lu: Po Feng Pian
description:
The young Qin Feng, hailed as a once-in-a-millennium prodigy in the Wuji Nation, was framed and his entire family was wiped out, leaving him alone. After his martial veins were crippled, he was cast into a small, remote sect to fend for himself. Determined to become stronger and seek revenge, he endured constant bullying, often protected by his kind-hearted Second Senior Sister, who shared a common fate. Unbeknownst to everyone, Qin Feng had already secretly embarked on the arduous path of physical cultivation. Upon learning that three members of his sect were eligible to train at the Tiandao Academy, and with the spots already secured, he broke free from his humiliation. Upon being humiliated once again by the sect's prodigy, Yun Tianyu, he revealed his physical cultivation identity and violently assaulted Yun Tianyu, shocking everyone. Afterwards, he took the initiative, repeatedly teaching Yun Tianyu a lesson, openly challenging the protective Great Elder, and vowing to get a spot in Tiandao Academy, because only in this way could he become stronger. To prevent his apprentice from being humiliated, the two sides finally agreed to a duel in seven days. The winner would receive a spot to practice in Tiandao Academy. During this process, Yun Tianyu broke through the realm and unexpectedly became the Son of God. He was sought after and everyone thought he would win easily. Even the Second Senior Sister tried to persuade him to give up and offered to give him her spot, but Qin Feng refused. In a few days, Qin Feng also received the saint's inheritance. While shouldering the responsibility of saving the human race, he began to secretly practice hellishly.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

Jing Yunxiao was once the supreme Emperor of Samsara on the Dragon Territory Continent. When faced with a conspiracy, he used the Five-Turn Samsara Technique to be reborn as a young man from the Jing family of Hongye Town. Drawing on his past life memories, Jing Yunxiao helped the Jing family overcome the threat of Black Dragon Village, but his grandfather, Jing Yufeng, was also seriously injured.

Desperate, Jing Yunxiao shouldered the responsibility of saving his family and journeyed alone to Huangshi City in search of medicine. Misfortunes never come singly. The Jing family, originally an aristocratic family in the capital of Baizhan Kingdom, retreated to Hongye Town to escape the pursuit of the God of War Palace. Jing Yunxiao's reappearance caught the attention of the God of War Palace. To eliminate the root of the problem, the God of War Palace dispatched the assassin organization, the Dark Feather Palace, to Huangshi City to assassinate Jing Yunxiao.

Meanwhile, Jing Yunxiao, in pursuit of medicine, defeated geniuses from all sides at the Hidden Dragon Competition and bravely entered the Thousand Machines Treasure to win the heart of the icy beauty Mu Shishi. While astonishing everyone with his skills, he also made enemies with many sects. With the sects seeking revenge in front and the Dark Feather Palace hunting behind, how Jing Yunxiao can protect his family and defeat this powerful enemy has become a mystery...

(Source: Tencent, translated)

In a world where warriors are respected, Shi Mu's fate seems destined to be different. As the adopted son of an aristocratic family, he is forced to embark on the road of a warrior to find the truth and redeem himself. From the four halls of Fengcheng to the struggle between sects, interests are entangled, and powerful enemies lurk. Every challenge makes Shi Mu more determined. In the end, Shi Mu realizes the power of his bloodline, which not only changes his own destiny, but also affects the future of many people.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

The scientist Chu Feng accidentally obtained the “Jin Wuling” that turned into a meteorite and fell. In order to explore its origin, Chu Feng created a supercomputer “Qiyuan”. With Qiyuan's help, Chu Feng learned that Jin Wuling actually came from a place called Wuhun. The mysterious world of the continent Chu Feng also inadvertently inspired Jin Wuling's power to be transported to Wuhun Continent. In the "Wuhun Continent", Chu Feng rescued Su Manqing, the third young lady of the Su family, but thus became enmity with the Nangong and Lu clans.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

In the vast Jiang Dynasty, the culture of swordsmanship has been passed down for millennia, and the people take pride in practicing it. However, reaching its pinnacle, the "Sword God Realm," is a rare feat. Over a decade ago, the once-powerful Wuji Sword God was severely injured by the schemes of the Changsheng Sword God, forcing him to retreat into seclusion in the mountains, detached from worldly affairs.

Now, Zhan Yibai, Wuji Sword God's only disciple, has finally come of age, and the time has arrived for him to embark on a journey of training as agreed upon by master and disciple. Before departing, to enhance Zhan Yibai's self-defense abilities, Wuji Sword God gifted him his personal sword and instructed him to rapidly achieve the realm of Sword God. New to the secular world, Zhan Yibai befriends Jiang Mingyue, Princess of the dynasty, and Li Kuang, the second son of the Prince of Zhennan. Hoping to rapidly grow, he and his companions participate in the "Ancient Dynasty Ruins" trial, embarking on a remarkable journey.

Ell, the strongest dragon in the Demon Realm, wants one thing: to die, so he can relax in the afterlife. Unfortunately, that’s easier said than done. After accidentally offing yet another hero, Ell has an idea. If no warrior can slay him, he’ll just raise one who can! After meeting the magician Lafi, Ell begins raising her son, Dino, for this purpose. So begins his hardest quest yet, parenthood.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

Born with a disability, Shen Xiang risked everything to go to a dangerous place to find medicine in order to open up his spiritual veins. While looking for the medicine, he accidentally saved an injured goddess and demoness, and awakened his divine veins. He guarded his father and family and became a great god of alchemy!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
Music video for FUJIYAMA CHARISMA. The song contains a cover of  “From the New World” and is Included in the project's third album, Charisma Gambo.

title_english: The Man From Dao Xiang Cun

description:
Follows Nekotarou, a cat from Kagoshima who aims to unify the country.

(Source: Anime News Network)
Music video directed by Shoutarou Kitamura for the song MafiosA by Inugami Korone.

On the way to an important gathering by train, the Princess Teeniepings suddenly disappeared without a trace! To make matters even more mysterious, a Legend Teenieping appears in a mirror before Romi. Together with the new Royal Teeniepings, a grand mission begins to catch the Princess Teeniepings!

The stage moves from the Mysterious Amusement Park to the "Strange Paradise," where our friends from season 1, PetitCure Mofurun and PetitCure Pollun, will meet new allies like PetitCure Niko and PetitCure Candy!

In a Strange Paradise entirely made up of sweets, everyone goes on a candy-eating spree!? Many more heartwarming and cute PetitCure stories that'll make you smile and feel all warm inside await ♡

(Source: Official Website News, translated, edited)
Music video for the song Lollipop by miComet (Sakura Miko and Hoshimachi Suisei).

The anime centers on sea otter brothers Anira and Kokora, who live at a certain aquarium. Anira is the older brother who is cool, but also has a naive side. The younger brother Kokora is a passionate otter who adores his older brother.

(Source: Anime News Network)

Second season of Dokodemo Makibao

A salaryman who was fired from his job and has no girlfriend is caught by some gals! He is treated like a molester just for looking at them, and the gals force their way into his house, demanding that he let them stay there, and have sex with him to kill time! This man, who has no experience with women, is toyed with by the gals who know no shyness! Whether in the living room, the bath, or in bed, the girls' "inspection" never stops!

(Source: Lune-soft, translated)

Chibi shorts posted on the official Kikaijikake no Marie twitter and youtube accounts.
