The anime is based on temp agency Improve's mascot Inpuru-kun. It centers on Inpuru-kun taking on absurd temp jobs.

Young Teto rides to school on his bed to school, the lonely lighthouse keeper asks the seagull for breakfast. As various people dream of tomorrow through their imaginations, harsh, rough waves of reality crash into their imaginations as Teto wanders into the darkness.

(Source: Kodansha Creator's Lab)

Music video directed by Tokito Satou for the song Kasukana Yuuhi by Mahou Shoujo holoWitches! (comprised of Amane Kanata, Sakura Miko, Himemori Luna, Houshou Marine, Shirakami Fubuki, and Yukihana Lamy)
Graduation work of Masataka Kihara at Tama Art University.

In the shadow of a ruinous war, three young women are serving as soldiers in a barren, snow-swept landscape. Their task is to scour the frozen wastes for stragglers of the Iron Army, eerie, formerly human flesh-weapons. Gros and especially the inexperienced Leichte admire Esus, stronger and wiser than they. Esus has her weaknesses, though, and unhealed wounds in her heart. Somewhere out there in the vast, deadly sea of snow lie answers—to Esus' pain, and to the awful secret of this war.

(Source: fantasiafestival.com)

Short episodes featuring Mega Evolution Pokémon released on the Pokémon Official YouTube Channel.

Music video directed by Yohei Kameyama for the song LET'S JUST CRASH by Calliope Mori.

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as the second opening song in the anime Gachiakuta.

One month into living on his own, Yi-hyuk was hoping for an exciting, dramatic start to his independent life—but not this kind of drama. What he doesn’t expect is to be tormented by the thunderous noise coming from the apartment next door.

Determined to put an end to it, he confronts his neighbor—only to make things infinitely worse when he accidentally punches him in the face.

Yi-hyuk tries everything—from childish pranks to petty power plays—but his neighbor just won’t budge. He even pleads on his knees to make the noise stop. Just when it seems the feud will never end, they finally manage to call an uneasy truce.

And somewhere along the way, Yi-hyuk realizes he might be falling for the very person who once drove him up the wall.

(Source: Minam)

BLUE GALE XABUNGLE SIDE R is a "experimental video" by Sunrise Robot Laboratory, the video reinterprets the world of Xabungle in a dynamic animation style that nevertheless evokes the often humorous and exaggerated tone of the original anime with the musical accompaniment of The IDOLM@STER Shiny Colors song "Ranburu" by Houkago Climax Girls.

Ji Miaomiao, a young woman just starting her career, is betrayed by a friend and left with a mountain of debt. While fleeing from ruthless debt collectors, she accidentally falls from a building. On the brink of death, a mysterious figure transforms her into a cat.

By a twist of fate, she ends up being adopted—by none other than her own boss, Lu Chengze. Thus begins her strange and magical 100-day life... as a cat.

(Source: Bilibili)
The third part of Mu Shen Ji.

title_romaji: Jujutsu Kaisen: Shibuya Jihen Tokubetsu Henshuu-ban x Shimetsu Kaiyuu Senkou Jouei
title_english: JUJUTSU KAISEN: Execution -Shibuya Incident x The Culling Game Begins-
description:
Movie compilation of the Shibuya Incident Arc from the second season of Jujutsu Kaisen and the first two episodes of the third season's Culling Game Arc.

A veil abruptly descends over the busy Shibuya area amid the bustling Halloween crowds, trapping countless civilians inside. Satoru Gojo, the strongest jujutsu sorcerer, steps into the chaos. But lying in wait are curse users and spirits scheming to seal him away.

Yuji Itadori, accompanied by his classmates and other top-tier jujutsu sorcerers, enters the fray in an unprecedented clash of curses — the Shibuya Incident.

In the aftermath, ten colonies across Japan are transformed into dens of curses in a plan orchestrated by Noritoshi Kamo, the most wicked sorcerer in history. As the deadly Culling Game starts, Special Grade sorcerer Yuta Okkotsu is assigned to carry out Yuji’s execution for his perceived crimes.

(Source: GKIDS)
Reze dances to IRIS OUT.
Music video directed by Kawasemi for the song Shade by ZUTOMAYO

title_romaji: Benghuai: Xingqiong Tiedao - The Her Ta De Mo Fa Chu Fang
title_english: Honkai: Star Rail - T H E H E R T A'S M A G I C K I T C H E N
description:
At the edge of the universe beyond the limits for most to reach, a genius began to think...
"If 42 types of magic cannot make a piece of cake that makes one explode with joy from the smell alone and suffer a most unwilling smile..."
"Then, that proves that this is a scientific theory that has yet to be studied fully."

(Source: Honkai Star Rail YouTube Channel)

In a modern martial arts world, Zhao Xin unexpectedly inherits the Celestial Realm's recycling station. This grants him not only the aid of numerous immortals but also the admiration of many beauties, ultimately leading him to the pinnacle of martial arts.

For millennia, the ancient and mysterious dragon race has thrived on the Central Plains. However, the conflict between the Light Soul and Dark Soul of the Divine Realm has also drawn the dragons into the fray. The dragons are plunged into a brutal internal strife, even facing the threat of extinction. In this moment of despair, the long-absent Prince Ao Xue of the East Sea returns with great force, determined to save the dragons from their peril.

title_english: Genshin Impact: Memories of This Life
description:
An individual's memories cannot bear the ceaseless suffering and lingering wishes of souls long departed over centuries.
But the weight of a soul can.

title_english: Genshin Impact: Wish in a Bottle
description:
Citlali has always lived in solitude,
And the children of the Masters of the Night-Wind usually only learn about the legendary Granny Itztli through frightening tales told by the adults.
Thus, they view her dwelling as a dangerous place, one that children are warned to stay away from.
However, some brave children still gather the courage
To seek out wishes that only the great shaman Citlali can fulfill...

(Source: YouTube description)
Music video for the song Shinitai Himawari by Shinsei Kamattechan.

Music video directed by Bakui for the song HAVEN by NILFRUITS, the song was originally created for the unit Vivid BAD SQUAD.for the game Project SEKAI COLORFUL STAGE!

Note: There exists 2 other versions, one by Vivid BAD SQUAD feat. Kagamine Len released on Jan 19, 2025 and a 7 vocaloid version uploaded on Feb 10, 2025. The version released on Jan 19, 2025 while released prior is not considered the official music video for the song.

A PV to commemorate the 25th anniversary of Digimon Adventure.

The short features all new footage depicting previously unseen scenes leading up to the final episode of the second season of Digimon, an episode which takes place 25 years into the future.

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

title_romaji: Liella Taiga Drama Gyarabou: Heanna Eika no Yume Hanashi
description: April Fools Liella no Uta special.

Raise your glasses and toast to a feast like no other, where the western winds fade into golden revelry.
On April 1st, Year 4██1 of the Light Calendar, The Grand Chrysos eagerly awaits your arrival!
"Honestly, I think "the Grand Restaurant" has a better ring to it."
"Uh... Your taste in names is certainly... one of a kind."

Note: Honkai Star Rail april fools special animated short for The Grand Restaurant

title_english: Genshin Impact: The Lights of Lantern Rite
description:
On this annual festival, people return from far and wide to gather in blissful reunion. They share stories of past joys and sorrows, and wish for all the best in the year to come.
Though fireworks may fade, laughter leaves behind a lingering warmth, one that nestles deep and sweet within the heart.

(Source: YouTube description)

MLB has teamed up with a crew of creators from the world of anime, tapping animators from One Piece and Full Metal Alchemist to release Heroes of the Game!

The power, precision, and skill needed for MLB players to reach the top of their game is almost superhuman. Now, that intensity is being showcased through the world of anime—connecting fans from America, Japan, the UK, and beyond.

The campaign features Shohei Ohtani as the Master of Both Sides of the Game, Paul Skenes as the pitcher with ferocious power to unleash, Aaron Judge as the Herculean hitter on a mission to become one of the all-time greats, and Juan Soto as the man who sees all and can change the game with just one swing.

(Source: YouTube description)

Music video directed by RIRI Yamashita for the song MONSTER by Ninomae Inanis, Ouro Kronii, Shiori Novella and Gigi Murin.

Note: This song serves as the the theme song for ENigmatic Recollection Chapter 2, The Chains of Fate!

title_romaji: Benghuai: Xingqiong Tiedao - Bu Xu Ci Xing
title_english: Honkai: Star Rail - On the Journey
description:
Behold the infinite possibilities of the vast cosmos. The silver rail has extended unto the stars...
Now is the time to Trailblaze! May your journey be fruitful!

(Source: Honkai Star Rail YouTube Channel)

title_romaji: Koikeya SDGs Gekijou Suss to Tina Season 6
title_english: Koikeya SDGs Theater Suss & Tina Season 6
description: Sixth season of Koikeya SDGs Gekijou Suss to Tina.

Shining friendship and strong claws! Metal Cardbot W!

After the Speranza incident, humans and Metal Cardbots began to coexist on Earth. Jun, a boy chosen by the Metal Breath, and his partner Blue Cop discovered a way for humans and Metal Cardbots to coexist. Then one day, a "Wild Cardbot" appears, holding a 60 million year secret.

Now, a new encounter begins to shake the world.

(Source: Metal Cardbot Wiki)

Sayaka Tsuneda, age 29, works at an advertising agency when one day a suit-wearing angel descends before her very own eyes?! The idol that gave her life worth meaning is now her co-worker and she's in charge of his training... Is this a dream?! Sayaka struggles to handle her own feelings as the two of them grow closer and closer. How will this awkward fan girl's love story end?!

(Source: MangaPlaza)
Music video directed by No.734 for the song Hachigatsu, Bou, Tsukiakari by Yorushika.

Shark Meow is an orange tabby kitty who wears a shark suit.
A little clumsy and always taking things at their own cozy pace,
but every day with their best kitty friends — and the rescued baby kitty, Little Meow —
is filled with unexpected little mishaps and sweet adventures.

A sunny warm spot in the park, the sparkle of the sea,
steam rising from freshly roasted sweet potatoes,
the fluttery feeling of the first snowfall…
These small everyday moments fill their world with warmth and delight.

You can’t help but smile and think, “So true!”
A soft and snuggly kitty anime that brings joy to everyday moments.

(Source: QTORY Channel)

title_romaji: Little Twin Stars: Hajimari no Monogatari
description:
The short is part of Sanrio's celebration of the Little Twin Stars characters' 50th anniversary.

(Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

Music video animated by Marie Yasui for the song Saishinwa by WANUKA.

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as the ending theme of the Taiyou yori mo Mabushii Hoshi anime.

title_romaji: Tomo ni Kagayaku Ashita no Tame ni.
description:
The connection between Hokkaido's harsh nature and its warm people. Through the story of a young woman searching for her own path despite her uncertainty, the film depicts "a brighter tomorrow together." With these words as its purpose, the HEPCO Group will continue to support the daily lives of the people of Hokkaido and the future of life on this land. We hope this animation will light a small flame in your heart.''

(Source: Official Youtube, translated)
The second season of Jian Lai.

Music video for the song Martian by Yorushika.

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as the opening theme to Shoushimin Series 2nd Season.

Kawasaki-based museum dedicated to Doraemon creator Fujiko F. Fujio's new short anime film commemorating the 40th anniversary of Fujio's Chinpui manga, in conjunction with an exhibition of artwork from the series.

There's a pond at a park near my home but I call it a swamp. The people and animals that gather there somehow share a swampy vibe, and they are there again today.

1st year work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

Keiko Hasegawa, 34, works at a funeral home in her small hometown. It’s not the best life, but it’s okay. One day, she’s assigned to a strange funeral—can she get through it without trouble?

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

OCTOPOLIS is a civilization created by octopuses. The inhabitants live on donuts and sleep inside chikuwas (fishcake tubes). They perceive themselves as donut holes and feel a deep urge to fill that void and become suckers, the embodiment of wholeness.

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

An old Japanese ryokan (inn) stands by the Kuma River. It was severely damaged in the 2020 floods, but the owner weaves it back together to its former glory.

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

A young fox falls in love at first sight with a princess who visits a nearby flower garden. He is consumed by self-loathing because he knows, as a fox, he is too different and unworthy of the princess.

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

My day begins by descending a hill. At the end of the day, I climb it and go home. Down and up I go, feeling what?

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

My hand has become an apple. So what does that make me?

1st year work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

I was hiding inside the crate when a light shone through a hole. I peeked out and found all the scenery I'd been longing for.

1st year work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

title_romaji: Nini to Nene no Dai Dasshutsu
description:
Nini and Nene are twin kittens who go on adventures in their balloon ship, just like they are happily doing today. However, their journey takes an unexpected turn when a thunderstorm suddenly appears, striking their balloon and causing it to crash. They land on a large cloud and enter a nearby house to seek help. Inside, they meet a mysterious girl.

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

Candles are flickering. In the dark, endless dreamscape, where do I find myself?

1st year work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

A diary of a woman in her twenties who lives far away from her hometown. Her room is warm, sometimes hot, and unsettling.

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)

Glass and Kumo shared a deep love but it did not last forever. In the lifetime that followed their parting, Glass gradually comes to understand the cycles of union and separation that one encounters in life.

Graduate Work 2025, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

(Source: Geidai Animation)
Music video directed by Odyk for the song Tententengoku Jigokugoku by Aiobahn featuring Nanahira and Pmaru-sama.
Music video directed by goru for the song Sanctuary by VOLTACTION.

The world was a temporary dwelling for all beings, and time flowed like passing travelers. Where the shattered sky opened its eerie eye, life perished and zones became forbidden. In the apocalypse, consequences followed, and life arose from death.

(Source: Youku)

Looking up, she could see the night sky embracing all that is. In that moment, a thousand emotions crystallized into questions.
Where hang the sun and moon? What canvas depicts the stars? The infinite universe and breadth of time question the smallness of man.
Yet it is these small specimens of mortality who may embark on long voyages, the power to create miracles firmly within their grasp.

(Source: YouTube description)
Music video directed by YM for the song ZIG-ZAG by Lui Takane.

title_romaji: Banjjakineun Ujeong Racing: Racer Hachuupinggwa Kkangchongpingui Tansaeng
title_english: Sparkling Friendship Racing: The Birth of Racers Hachuping and Kangchongping
description:
Step into the world of Catch! Teenieping like never before—where speed meets sparkle and friendship fuels the finish line. In this special animated spin-off, Hyundai introduces Heartsping and Hoppingping, two rookie racers joining their very first racing team!

Note: Premiered as part of the Youth Adventure 2025 exhibition at the Hyundai Motorstudio in Goyang, Korea

Music video directed and animated by Miyo Satou for the song Hebi by Yorushika.

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as the second ending theme of the anime Chi. Chikyuu no Undou ni Tsuite.
Music video directed by StudioXD for the song BAZUBI BAZAB by Towa Tokoyami

Adapted from the most outstanding collection of Chinese classical short stories.

Pu Songling, a scholar, stays overnight at Lanruo Temple. He is caught by two monsters, Toad and Turtle, and brought to the bottom of an ancient well to judge the quality of his stories.

In a temple, a well, and a tree, classic chapters of Strange Stories, such as The Taoist Priest of Mount Laoshan, Lotus Princess, Nie Xiaoqian, Painted Skin, and Lady Lu, unfold one after another across the vicissitudes of life. Six story styles present an audio-visual feast of the most bizarre stories, the most emotional and the most fateful.

Ordinary life repeats itself every day. The succession of moments that we repeat over and over again is never the same, and everything changes and wavers. The moment we touch something, our consciousness can go to a place that does not exist anywhere in the past, nor in the future. In an uncertain and fluctuating world, only the feeling of the body touching something, which exists only in this present reality, can be recognized as “now”. That moment is lovely.

(Source: YouTube description)

Note: Premiered at the 75th Berlin International Film Festival on February 15, 2025

title_romaji: Qiyun Dantian: Kaiju Qiandao Zhizun Dantian

description:
Dongfang Shaohong, possessing two Dao bodies, but lacking the spiritual roots to awaken his spirit body, is ridiculed by his own clan and even betrayed by his fiancée. Troubles pile up one after another. Dongfang Shaohong's father, imprisoned for possessing the secret to entering the Cangyu Immortal Palace, is trapped by the Immortal Alliance. In the midst of his clan's crisis, Dongfang Shaohong inadvertently uses his own blood to activate the Dao Stone of Immortal Source within him, repelling the Immortal Alliance and saving the clan from the brink. In these dire straits, Dongfang Shaohong is fortunately rescued by his father's friend, Master Ji Yin, and is offered refuge within the Piaomiao Sect. Within the Taiyin Mountain ravine of the Piaomiao Sect, Dongfang Shaohong diligently cultivates, but possessing the Dark Night Dao Body of the Nether Clan is viewed as an anomaly among the human race and constantly harassed by his fellow disciples. Dongfang Shaohong realizes that only by becoming powerful enough can he rescue his father, clear his name, and expose the Immortal Alliance's conspiracy.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

"I came from the wilderness, raised by five incredibly powerful grandparents. To uncover the truth behind my parents' murder, I return to the city."

Watch as this young hero, skilled in martial arts, music, chess, medicine, and cooking, feigns weakness to outsmart others, surrounded by beautiful women, rises against all odds, solves a shocking mystery, and vows to become the city's all-around master, the undisputed ruler of this land!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)

Pan Gaofeng, a young rocket development engineer born in the 1980s, joined the First Academy of Aerospace Science and Technology, the cradle of my country's launch vehicles, after graduating from graduate school. He was fortunate to be a member of the development team for the Long March 5 (CZ-5), my country's most powerful launch vehicle. Working alongside his predecessors and colleagues, he overcame numerous difficulties, overcame obstacles, and defied external ridicule and skepticism. He rose from the ashes of a failed launch to ultimately achieve success, marking a crucial step in my country's transition from a major space power to a leading space power.

title_romaji: Benghuai: Xingqiong Tiedao - Yilun Zhaoyang de Mingyun
title_english: Honkai: Star Rail  — The Destiny of Each New Dawn
description:
Darkest night falls as the sun sets in the west, only to rise again in the east. Such is the destiny of each new dawn.

(Source: Honkai Star Rail YouTube Channel)

title_romaji: Maomao no Hitorigoto: USJ wo Chousa Seyo!
description: Special mini anime for The Apothecary Diaries x Universal Studios Japan Collaboration event released on the TOHO animation YouTube channel.

Music video directed by Ayume Kuroshima for the song One Last Wish by DADA GAUGUIN.

Note: There exists 2 versions of this song, the original sung by DADA GAUGUIN released on July 12, 2025, and a SynthV version featuring Kasane Teto released on Aug 1, 2025. The SynthV version features other visuals as well.

Tall, blonde and blue-eyed, it is impossible not to notice Isak Borg, First Secretary to the Swedish Embassy in Pyongyang. As a diplomat, he is under constant surveillance and strongly discouraged from interacting with the locals. Despite this, he secretly dates Bok-joo, a local traffic officer, but when one last effort to extend his stay is rejected, Isak begs her to come back to Stockholm with him. Bok-joo turns this idea down and abruptly disappears. Oblivious to the danger he is putting the woman he loves in, Isak asks Myeong-jun, his assigned interpreter, for help. When Myeong-jun refuses, a desperate Isak becomes increasingly suspicious of everyone.

(Source: Tribeca Film)

Music video for the song Guruguru Live by Tsukasa Yuzaki (CV: Akari Kitou).

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as the ending theme of the anime Tonikaku Kawaii: Joshikou-hen.

Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Tsugumi Wender's storyline from the anime series.

Tsugumi Wenders, a girl who lives in a lighthouse on an island, has to return to a distant land when summer ends. Tsumugi, along with Hairi and Shizuku, decides to spend the rest of her summer vacation searching for what she wants to do.

(Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Ao Sorakado's storyline from the anime series.

While Hairi becomes close to Ao, a girl from the island who always seems sleepy for some reason, he witnesses Ao carrying out a "duty" that has been passed down through the generations of the Sorakado family.

While helping with this "duty", Hairi learns the secret of the "butterfly" and Ao's true purpose.

(Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

Theatrical edited version of Summer Pockets following Shiroha Naruse storyline from the anime series.

Shiroha, a girl who keeps her distance from the people on the island and is always alone, gradually begins to open up to Hairi, who unreservedly gets closer to her.

Over the course of the summer, Hairi witnesses the "mysterious power" that Shiroha possesses...

(Source: TOHO Cinemas, translated)

Music video directed and animated by Totorika for the song Remember by yuigot and Yachiyo Runami (Saori Hayami).

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as the inserted opening song of the anime Chou Kaguya-hime!
Light-hearted chibi-style shorts of Lord of Mysteries about the daily life of various characters, aired alongside the 1st season of the series.
Unaired episode 13 of Musashino!, released exclusively as a bonus on Crunchyroll.

title_romaji: Mao he Lao Shu: Xing Pan qi Yuan
description:
Tom and Jerry: Forbidden Compass follows the iconic cat-and-mouse duo as they accidentally travel through time in a museum. Along their journey, they meet a group of intriguing new companions and become involved in a final showdown with mysterious forces.

(Source: Deadline)

Note: The film's runtime was cut down for the US release, shortening it to 92 minutes. Premiered at the Shanghai International Film Festival on June 20, 2025.

title_romaji: Kanojo ga Separate wo Matou Riyuu
description:
Amane Kujou, a virgin girl frustrated with her chaste boyfriend who only kisses her, channels her energy into the track and field club. However, her strong sexual desire, typical of an athlete, fuels her growing frustration. To make matters worse, a middle-aged man can’t stop staring at her provocative athletic uniform.

Living alone in an apartment, Amane indulges in nightly masturbation. Unbeknownst to her, the middle-aged landlord secretly records her behavior!

In exchange for deleting the videos, he demands a one-sided physical relationship.

Though unwanted, Amane’s unsatisfied body begins to crave the man’s touch more and more… What will become of Amane?!

title_romaji: Watashi wa, Watashi no Koto ga Suki.
description:
Music video directed by Suguru Asakura and Nagi Oonami for the song Watashi wa, Watashi no Koto ga Suki. by HoneyWorks and Kaguya (Yuuko Natsuyoshi).

Note: The song featured in this music video also serves as an insert song of the anime Chou Kaguya-hime!

Animated collaborative commercial between Aqura Home and WIT STUDIO, featuring Aqua Home's official character Aqurin.

Note: There exists a 15 seconds version and a 30 seconds version..

Graduation work of Kazuna Okada at Tama Art University, 2024.

Very Chubby Belly, nobody really likes her. Very Chubby Belly, they even wish her to be gone. Very Chubby Belly, she is in everywhere. Very Chubby Belly, little sad sweetheart. And I want to cuddle such a sweetie with lots of love. Very Chubby Belly.

Based on this poem written by Okada above. the work features small, warm, letter-like animation.

title_romaji: Jongtama x Gintama Collab Kettei Promotion Anime
title_english: Mahjong Soul X Gintama Collab - Anime Preview
description: An animated collab PV between Mahjong Soul and Gintama to commemorate the in-game collaboration.
Animated short made to promote the new 3D model of Japanese VTuber Karubi Akami. First shown at CR FES 2025 and later showcased on the debut stream of her new 3D model on Twitch and YouTube.
Graduation work of animator Fukuho Tamanoi at Tama Art University, 2024.
Music video directed by Hamono Eirina for the song Love Attribute by PinocchioP featuring Hatsune Miku.

title_romaji: Di Ling Ai: Mo Shui Linglong
description:
All things possess a spirit, and the power of nature coalesced into various conscious fairies. However, due to humanity's neglect of nature and the awakening of suppressed powers, the fairies have been harmed. A human girl encounters a fairy from the depths of the water and they have known each other for many years. However, they cannot overcome the barrier between celestial and mortal. On a wondrous journey, the girl resolves to find her own power. She believes that humanity is also part of nature, and that there must be a way for humans and nature to coexist harmoniously. Can she protect nature?

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

Short prologue animation released as a prelude and advertisement for the game Digimon Story Time Stranger.

Set to Digimon Story Time Stranger's theme song "wherever you are", the Prelude short focuses on Inori and her younger brother just before the main story's events.

(Source: Bandai Namco Entertainment's YouTube Channel)

Woo-Ri’s 5-year old poodle mix, Maru, has turned into a human — a 5-year old little girl, that is! Now Woo-Ri’s gone from pet owner to big sister, and it’s her job to keep Maru out of trouble. Human Maru has the same endless curiosity and playfulness of a puppy, but now she can walk into grocery stores, go to kindergarten, and check this out — hold things with her opposable thumbs. Being human rules!

(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

Special 25th anniversary commemorative promotional video for P.A. Works looking back at the studio's titles they have made.

Note: Originally screened at the P.A. Works 25th anniversary Lantern Festival on October 19, 2025. The video was later uploaded to their YouTube channel on October 22, 2025.
Special animated commercials for the video game collaboration between Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves and Street Fighter 6, adding Ken and Chun Li as playable characters to the game.

The story takes place in a world where human civilization has collapsed and fallen into ruin.
In this world, there are people who live in groups and people who live individually, moving around. – a world of freedom, so to speak.
Two girls, Haru and Tamo, who live in such a world, board an old train they come across by chance and travel through the decadent world day by day.

(Source: Niigata International Animation Film Festival)

Notes:
- Initially pre-screened at the Niigata International Animation Film Festival on March 15, 2025, as well as at the Fantasia Film Festival on July 19, 2025.
- Selected for the Fantasia Film Festival Anime no Bento official selection highlighting indie talent, as well as winning the audience award and gold award in the Animated Short category at the Fantasia Film Festival 2025.
Music video for the song DIGITAL LOVE feat. Hoshimachi Suisei by WurtS.

A series of vertical animated shorts that were posted weekly on Pokémon's social media accounts that were inspired by the mobile game Pokémon Sleep and was themed around spending time and waking up with your Pokémon on Monday mornings.

This entry includes:
1) ニャオハ / Nyahoja / Sprigatito
2) ウインディ/ Windie / Arcanine
3) ホゲータ / Hogator / Fuecoco
4) キテルグマ / Kiteruguma / Bewear
5) クワッス / Kuwassu / Quaxly
6) イーブイ / Eievui / Eevee
Music video directed by Chika Nagaoka for the song F/ACE OFF by F/ACE.
